slides.headline: Project Atlas: Commercial Due Diligence
slides.subtitle: Confidential — Prepared for Apollo Capital Partners
slides.author: Transaction Advisory Group

items.title: Market Attractiveness
items.description: TAM/SAM sizing, growth drivers, regulatory landscape

items.title: Financial Bridge & Synergies
items.description: Revenue bridge, cost synergies, integration risks

items.title: Risk Assessment & Valuation
items.description: Key risks, management quality, valuation scenarios

slides.headline: Atlas is a compelling acquisition — strong market position with clear value creation levers

bullets.text: Atlas holds #2 position in a $14B market growing at 8% CAGR, with defensible share in the fastest-growing sub-segment (cloud-native infrastructure)
Customer retention of 94% and NRR of 118% signal strong product-market fit — top-decile among peers
Revenue concentration risk is manageable: top 10 customers represent 28% of ARR, down from 41% three years ago
$45-65M of identified cost synergies from platform consolidation and procurement leverage, achievable within 18 months
Key risk: pending regulatory change in EU (Digital Markets Act) could impact 15% of revenue — mitigation plan required

slides.source: Management interviews, customer calls (n=32), public filings, Gartner

slides.headline: Market Attractiveness
slides.subtitle: A large and growing market with structural tailwinds favoring the target

slides.headline: Atlas operates in a $14B market with above-GDP growth driven by cloud migration

stats.label: Atlas Market Position
stats.context: Up from #4 in 2021, fastest share gainer

slides.source: Gartner, IDC, company filings; TAM defined as global infrastructure monitoring software

slides.headline: Atlas has gained 3pp of market share since 2021, outpacing all competitors
slides.source: IDC Software Tracker 2024; company estimates for non-public competitors
footnotes: Market share based on recurring revenue; excludes professional services

overlays.text: +3pp gain — fastest share mover in market

slides.headline: Customer & Revenue Quality
slides.subtitle: High retention and expanding accounts underpin revenue predictability

slides.headline: Net revenue retention has expanded from 108% to 118% over 8 quarters
slides.source: Company data; peer median from public SaaS comps (n=24)

slides.headline: Customer concentration has improved significantly — top 10 now 28% of ARR vs 41% in 2021

overlays.text: Top 10 = 28% of ARR, down from 41% in 2021

slides.headline: Revenue bridge shows $92M growth driven by expansion and new logos, partially offset by churn
footnotes: ARR defined as annualized recurring revenue at period end

slides.headline: Synergy assessment identifies $45-65M opportunity across four categories
slides.source: Integration planning team, preliminary estimates subject to diligence

slides.headline: Management team is strong with one critical gap in product leadership

left.title: Strengths
bullets: CEO: 12-year tenure, built ARR from $40M to $414M
CRO: Recruited from Datadog in 2022, accelerated enterprise sales 40%
CFO: IPO-ready finance org with strong controls and forecasting
Strong bench: 4 of 6 VP-level leaders promoted internally

right.title: Gaps & Risks
bullets: CPO departed 6 months ago — interim leader is CTO (dual-hatting)
Product velocity has slowed: feature releases down 30% in H2
Key-person risk: CEO relationship-driven with 3 of top 5 accounts
Recommendation: Budget $500K for CPO search, close within 90 days

slides.source: Management interviews (n=14), reference calls (n=8), LinkedIn analysis

slides.headline: Three valuation scenarios yield a range of $1.8B to $2.6B equity value

columns.title: Bear Case
bullets: Growth decelerates to 15% on competitive pressure
NRR declines to 110% as expansion slows
No synergy capture in Year 1
Regulatory headwind impacts 10% of rev

columns.title: Base Case
bullets: Growth sustains at 22% through FY2026
NRR stable at 115-118%
$45M synergies captured by Month 18
Market share continues expanding

columns.title: Bull Case
bullets: Growth accelerates to 28% with new product
NRR expands to 125% on platform play
$65M synergies plus revenue synergies
Successful international expansion

slides.source: DCF analysis, public comps, precedent transactions; management plan inputs

slides.headline: 100-day integration plan with five critical milestones to protect value

milestones.title: Stabilize
milestones.description: Retain key talent, customer comms, systems access, governance setup

milestones.title: Assess
milestones.description: Deep-dive on product roadmap, customer health, technical debt

milestones.title: Quick Wins
milestones.description: Procurement savings, duplicative tool elimination, org alignment

milestones.title: Transform
milestones.description: Platform consolidation begins, GTM realignment, CPO hired

milestones.title: Report
milestones.description: Board update: synergy tracking, retention metrics, revised plan
